sqlMap.select: select defaultview, startday, starttime, endtime, autodelete, remindertime, defaultviewcheck from tbl_scheduleconfig where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select distinct a.groupid as groupid, groupname, '' as description, '' as createdate, a.groupcolor as groupcolor, creatorid from tbl_schedulegroup a left join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where (creatorid = #v_USERID# or ( memberid = #v_USERID# and status = 1 )) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and a.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# order by groupname

select scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, date_add(a.createdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as createdate, a.creatorid, a.creatorname, a.creatorname2, a.createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, date_add(a.modifydate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, date_add(a.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(a.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, b.groupname, a.companyid, b.groupcolor, showtop from tbl_schedule a left join tbl_schedulegroup b on a.ownerid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, a.creatorid, a.creatorname, a.creatorname2, date_add(a.createdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as createdate, a.modifierid, a.modifiername, a.modifiername2, date_add(a.modifydate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, date_add(a.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(a.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, b.groupname, a.companyid, CASE WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 1 THEN 'rgb(1, 138, 249)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 2 THEN 'rgb(1, 179, 63)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 3 THEN 'rgb(254, 28, 113)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 7 THEN b.groupcolor ELSE 'rgb(233, 222, 19)' END AS GROUPCOLOR, showtop from tbl_schedule a left join tbl_schedulegroup b on a.ownerid = b.groupid where (a.ownerid IN
#v_INDILIST[]#
and ( (a.startdate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.startdate <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.enddate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate < #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.startdate < #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate >= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.datetype='3') ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
AND a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%')
AND location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%')
AND ( a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') OR location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') )
) or (a.ownerid IN
#v_PIDLIST[]#
and a.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and ((a.scheduletype = '2' and a.ownerid in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# UNION ALL SELECT DEPARTMENTCN FROM tbl_schedule_public_dept WHERE USERCN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )) or (a.scheduletype <> '2')) and ( (a.startdate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.startdate <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.enddate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate < #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.startdate < #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate >= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.datetype='3') ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
AND a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%')
AND location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%')
AND ( a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') OR location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') )
) order by a.startdate asc
select groupid, groupname, description, createdate, groupcolor from tbl_schedulegroup where creatorid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# order by groupname

SELECT COUNT(U.MEMBERID) FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT a.DEPARTMENT FROM (SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, A.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) A WHERE A.CN = #v_USERID# and A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY A.CN

SELECT U.MEMBERID, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, U.MAIL, '' AS STATUS, '' RESPONSEDATE, U.DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN CONCAT(U.DISPLAYNAME, '(', D.DISPLAYNAME, ')') WHEN '2' THEN CONCAT(U.DISPLAYNAME2, '(', D.DISPLAYNAME2, ')') END INFO FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT U.MEMBERID, G.GROUPNAME, G.DESCRIPTION, U.DISPLAYNAME AS MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS MEMBERNAME2, U.STATUS AS STATUS, DATE_ADD(U.RESPONSEDATE, INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# MINUTE) AS RESPONSEDATE, U.MAIL AS MAIL, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, '' AS INFO, U.WRITEPERMISSION FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.RESPONSEDATE, A.STATUS, A.WRITEPERMISSION, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID WHERE U.groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND U.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( select cn, case #v_LANG# when '1' then displayname when '2' then displayname2 end displayname, displayname2, case #v_LANG# when '1' then description when '2' then description2 end description, description2, title , title2 , telephonenumber from tbl_usermaster where
department in ( select cn from tbl_deptmaster where dept_cd_path like concat('%',#v_DEPTID#,'%') and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )
department = #v_DEPTID#
and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND cn not in ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , case #v_LANG# when '1' then A.displayname when '2' then A.displayname2 end displayname, A.displayname2, case #v_LANG# when '1' then C.DISPLAYNAME when '2' then C.DISPLAYNAME2 end description, C.DISPLAYNAME2, A.title , A.title2 , A.telephonenumber FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON B.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AA ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC
select lunaruse from tbl_lunaruse where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select previoslyregiuse from tbl_previoslyregi where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select secretaryid , secretaryname from tbl_secretary where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# order by secretaryname

select userid as secretaryid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then username when '2' then username2 end secretaryname from tbl_secretary where secretaryid = #v_CN# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#

select departmentcn as deptid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then departmentname when '2' then departmentname2 end deptname from tbl_schedule_public_dept where usercn = #v_CN# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, case #v_LANG# when '1' then U.DESCRIPTION when '2' then U.DESCRIPTION2 end title FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE U.CN = #v_CN# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# UNION ALL select deptid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then b.displayname when '2' then b.displayname2 end title from tbl_addjobmaster a join tbl_deptmaster b on a.deptid = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.cn = #v_CN# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
select count(attendantid) from tbl_attendant where attendantid = #v_USERID# and ( status = 0 or status = 3 ) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select count(a.groupid) from tbl_schedulegroup a join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where memberid = #v_USERID# and ( status = 0 or status = 3 ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and a.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
select count(1) from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select attendantid, attendantname, attendantname2, attendantdeptname, attendantdeptname2, status, date_add(responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by attendantname
select attachid, filesize, filename, filepath from tbl_scheduleattach where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

isEqual.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where (usecompany = 'ALL' or usecompany = #v_USERCOMPANY#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and isuse = 1

isNotEqual.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where (usecompany = 'ALL' or usecompany = #v_USERCOMPANY#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and isuse = 1 and isrest = 1

select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where (usecompany = 'ALL' or usecompany = #v_USERCOMPANY#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where usecompany = 'ALL' and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by date_format(holidaydate,'%m%d'), issolar, substring(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6);
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by date_format(holidaydate,'%m%d'), issolar, substring(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6);

sqlMap.select: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidayflag, holidaydate, holidayrepeat, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and (date_format(holidaydate,'%Y') = #holidayYear# or isrepeat = 1 or holidayrepeat like concat(#holidayYear# , '%')) order by date_format(holidaydate,'%m%d'), issolar, substring(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6);
select last_insert_id()
select count(1) from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select date_format(date_add(startDate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute), '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#

select b.scheduleid as scheduleid, a.status as status, date_add(a.responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate, b.creatorid as creatorid, b.creatorname as creatorname, b.creatorname2 as creatorname2, b.title as title, b.location as location, b.datetype as datetype, date_add(b.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(b.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, b.repetition as repetition, showtop from tbl_attendant a join tbl_schedule b on a.scheduleid = b.scheduleid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.attendantid = #v_USERID# and ( a.status = 0 or a.status = 3 ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by a.responsedate desc

select a.groupid as groupid, groupname, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, description, status, date_add(responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate from tbl_schedulegroup a join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where memberid = #v_USERID# and (status = 0 or status = 3) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by groupname
select ownerid, num, companyid, reflag from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2 from tbl_schedulegroup where groupId = #v_GROUPID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT INVITATIONMAIL, INVITESCHEMODMAIL, CANCELLATIONMAIL, ATTENDANCEMAIL, REJECTEDMAIL FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule( parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id, companyid, showtop ) values ( 0, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_OWNERNAME2#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, utc_timestamp(), #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, utc_timestamp(), #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_IMPORTANCE#, #v_HASATTENDANT#, #v_HASATTACH#, 'N', 'N', #v_ISPUBLIC#, #v_DATETYPE#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_ENDDATE#, ifnull(#v_REPETITION#, ''), '', #v_TITLE#, ifnull(#v_LOCATION#, ''), #v_CONTENTPATH#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_SHOWTOP# )

insert into tbl_attendant( scheduleid, attendantid, attendantname, attendantname2, attendantdeptname, attendantdeptname2, status, tenant_id, responsedate, companyid ) values ( #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2#, 0, #v_TENANTID#, utc_timestamp(), #v_COMPANYID# )

insert into tbl_schedulerepetition_del( scheduleid, startdate, enddate, tenant_id, companyid ) select scheduleid , #v_STARTDATE#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID# from tbl_schedule where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#

insert into tbl_schedulerepetition_del( scheduleid, startdate, enddate, tenant_id, companyid ) select s.scheduleid , d.startdate, d.enddate, s.tenant_id, s.companyid from tbl_schedule s inner join tbl_schedulerepetition_del d on (s.parentid = d.scheduleid and s.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and s.companyid = d.companyid) where s.parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and s.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, MEMBERDEPTID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET MEMBERNAME = #v_MEMBERNAME#, MEMBERNAME2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, MEMBERDEPTID = #v_MEMBERDEPTID#, TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule( parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id, companyid, showtop ) ( select #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, 'Y', ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id, companyid, #v_SHOWTOP# from tbl_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule set modifierid = #v_MODIFIERID#, modifiername = #v_MODIFIERNAME#, modifiername2 = #v_MODIFIERNAME2#, modifydate = utc_timestamp(), importance = #v_IMPORTANCE#, hasattach = #v_HASATTACH#, ispublic = #v_ISPUBLIC#, datetype = #v_DATETYPE#, startdate = #v_STARTDATE#, enddate = #v_ENDDATE#, repetition = ifnull(#v_REPETITION#, ''), title = #v_TITLE#, location = ifnull(#v_LOCATION#, ''), showtop = #v_SHOWTOP# where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_schedulegroupmember set status = #v_STATUS#, responsedate = utc_timestamp() where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_schedule set hasattendant = #v_HASATTENDANT# where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_attendant set status = #v_STATUS#, responsedate = utc_timestamp() where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and attendantid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_scheduleconfig set defaultview = #v_DEFAULTVIEW#, startday = #v_STARTDAY#, starttime = #v_STARTTIME#, endtime = #v_ENDTIME#, autodelete = #v_AUTODELETE#, remindertime = #v_REMINDERTIME#, defaultviewcheck = #v_DEFAULTVIEWCHECKBOX# where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_scheduleconfig set InvitationMail = #v_INVITATIONMAIL#, INVITESCHEMODMAIL = #v_INVITESCHEMODMAIL#, CancellationMail = #v_CANCELLATIONMAIL#, AttendanceMail = #v_ATTENDANCEMAIL#, RejectedMail = #v_REJECTEDMAIL#
where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedulegroup where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid in (select scheduleid from tbl_schedule where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_scheduleconfig where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_secretary where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
delete from tbl_scheduleattach where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedule where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and attendantid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedule where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and ownerid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule set modifierid = #v_MODIFIERID#, modifiername = #v_MODIFIERNAME#, modifiername2 = #v_MODIFIERNAME2#, modifydate = utc_timestamp(), startdate = #v_STARTDATE#, enddate = #v_ENDDATE# where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_schedulegroup set creatorid = #v_MEMBERID#, creatorname = #v_MEMBERNAME#, creatorname2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, precreatorid = #v_CREATORID#, precreatorname = #v_CREATORNAME#, precreatorname2 = #v_CREATORNAME2#, transferdate = utc_timestamp() where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_schedulegroupmember set memberid = #v_CREATORID#, membername = #v_CREATORNAME#, membername2 = #v_CREATORNAME2#, responsedate = utc_timestamp()
where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
update tbl_schedulegroup set groupname = #v_GROUPNAME#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, groupColor = #v_GROUPCOLOR#, modifydate = utc_timestamp() where groupid = #v_GUID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(SCHEDULEID) FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND ISALLREP = #v_ISALLREP# AND STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT DISTINCT ISALLREP FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID#
AND REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE ( SCHEDULEID, REPEATCOUNT, ISALLREP, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) (SELECT DISTINCT S.SCHEDULEID, #v_REPEATCOUNT#, #v_ISALLREP#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID# FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C RIGHT OUTER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON (C.SCHEDULEID = NULL OR S.SCHEDULEID = C.SCHEDULEID OR S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE C FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON (S.SCHEDULEID = C.SCHEDULEID OR S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#)
AND C.REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND C.ISALLREP = #v_ISALLREP# AND C.STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE#
AND C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

DELETE C FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON (S.SCHEDULEID = C.SCHEDULEID OR S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND C.ISALLREP != #v_ISALLREP# AND C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE ( SCHEDULEID, REPEATCOUNT, ISALLREP, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) (SELECT S.SCHEDULEID, C.REPEATCOUNT, C.ISALLREP, C.STARTDATE, C.TENANT_ID, C.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: select GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where companyid = #companyID# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and userid = #id#
select * from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where userid = #v_USERID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule_oauthinfo( USERID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN, GOOGLECREATEDATE, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) values ( #v_USERID#, #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, #v_GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN#, case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else #v_TODAYUTCTIME# end, case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else #v_TODAYUTCTIME# end, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule_oauthinfo set USERID = #v_USERID#, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN#, GOOGLECREATEDATE = case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then GOOGLECREATEDATE else case when GOOGLECREATEDATE is null then #v_TODAYUTCTIME# else GOOGLECREATEDATE end end, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE = case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else case when GOOGLEUPDATEDATE is null then #v_TODAYUTCTIME# else GOOGLEUPDATEDATE end end where userid = #v_USERID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: select USERID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN IS NOT NULL and GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN IS NOT NULL

select USERID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where DATE_ADD(GOOGLEUPDATEDATE, INTERVAL + 50 MINUTE) < #v_TODAYUTCTIME# and GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN IS NOT NULL and GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN IS NOT NULL
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule_oauthinfo set GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE = #v_TODAYUTCTIME# where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.select:
select scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, a.creatorid, a.creatorname, a.creatorname2, date_add(a.createdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as createdate, a.modifierid, a.modifiername, a.modifiername2, date_add(a.modifydate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, date_add(a.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(a.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, b.groupname, a.companyid, CASE WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 1 THEN 'rgb(1, 138, 249)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 2 THEN 'rgb(1, 179, 63)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 3 THEN 'rgb(254, 28, 113)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 7 THEN b.groupcolor ELSE 'rgb(233, 222, 19)' END AS GROUPCOLOR, showtop from tbl_schedule a left join tbl_schedulegroup b on a.ownerid = b.groupid where (a.ownerid in
#v_INDILIST[]#
and ispublic = #v_ISPUBLIIC# and ( (a.startdate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.startdate <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.enddate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate < #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.startdate < #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate >= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.datetype='3') ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
and a.title like concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#, '%')
) or (a.ownerid in
#v_PIDLIST[]#
and a.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and ((a.scheduletype = '2' and a.ownerid in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# UNION ALL SELECT DEPARTMENTCN FROM tbl_schedule_public_dept WHERE USERCN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )) or (a.scheduletype <> '2')) and ( (a.startdate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.startdate <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.enddate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate < #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.startdate < #v_PSTARTDATE# and a.enddate >= #v_PENDDATE#) or (a.datetype='3') ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
and a.title like concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#, '%')
) order by a.startdate asc

SELECT STATUS FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = (SELECT CASE WHEN PARENTID = '0' THEN SCHEDULEID ELSE PARENTID END AS SCHEDULEID FROM ( SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# ) A ) AND ATTENDANTID = #v_ATTENDANTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule_reminder_scheduler( scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, scheduletype, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, title, tenant_id, companyid, reminderstatus, offsetinfo, lang, OFFSETMIN ) values ( #v_SCHEDULEID#, 0, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_OWNERNAME2#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_DATETYPE#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_ENDDATE#, ifnull(#v_REPETITION#, ''), #v_TITLE#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_REMINDERSTATUS#, #v_OFFSET#, #v_LANG#, #v_OFFSETMIN#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER SET STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE#, ENDDATE = #v_ENDDATE#,
DATETYPE = #v_DATETYPE#,
REPETITION = IFNULL(#v_REPETITION#, ''),
TITLE = #v_TITLE#,
REMINDERSTATUS = #v_REMINDERSTATUS# WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.OWNERNAME AS OWNERNAME, TSRS.OWNERNAME2 AS OWNERNAME2, TSRS.CREATORID AS CREATORID, TSRS.CREATORNAME AS CREATORNAME, TSRS.CREATORNAME2 AS CREATORNAME2, (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) END) AS REMINDSTARTDATE, DATE_ADD(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) AS STARTDATE, DATE_ADD(TSRS.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) AS ENDDATE, TSRS.TITLE AS TITLE, TSRS.DATETYPE AS DATETYPE, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID, TSRS.OFFSETMIN AS OFFSETMIN, TSRS.OFFSETINFO AS OFFSETINFO, TSRS.LANG AS LANG, 0 AS REPEATCOUNT, TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE AS SCHEDULETYPE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS TODAYDATE, TSRS.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE != '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE = '1' AND TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END) >= #nowTime# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END) < DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL #cronMinute# MINUTE)

SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.OWNERNAME AS OWNERNAME, TSRS.OWNERNAME2 AS OWNERNAME2, TSRS.CREATORID AS CREATORID, TSRS.CREATORNAME AS CREATORNAME, TSRS.CREATORNAME2 AS CREATORNAME2, DATE_ADD(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) AS STARTDATE, DATE_ADD(TSRS.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) AS ENDDATE, (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) END) AS REMINDSTARTDATE, TSRS.REPETITION AS REPETITION, TSRS.TITLE AS TITLE, TSRS.DATETYPE AS DATETYPE, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID, TSRS.OFFSETMIN AS OFFSETMIN, TSRS.OFFSETINFO AS OFFSETINFO, TSRS.LANG AS LANG, TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE AS SCHEDULETYPE, TSRS.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE ='1' AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND (TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL OR TSC.ISALLREP != 'Y') AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5), #allDaySTime#) ELSE SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5) END ) >= SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5) AND (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5), #allDaySTime#) ELSE SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5) END ) < SUBSTRING(DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL #cronMinute# MINUTE), INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), 12, 5) AND (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(TSRS.REPETITION, '|', 1) != '0' AND (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSRS.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END) < DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL #cronMinute# MINUTE) THEN 1 WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(TSRS.REPETITION, '|', 1) = '0' AND DATE_SUB(TSRS.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) > #nowTime# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1

SELECT TSD.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_ADD(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) END) AS STARTDATE, DATE_ADD(TSD.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) AS ENDDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL TSD INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSD.SCHEDULEID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != '0' AND TSD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END ) >= #nowTime# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSD.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END ) < DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL #cronMinute# MINUTE)

SELECT TSC.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_ADD(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_ADD(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSRS.OFFSETMIN MINUTE) END AS STARTDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != '0' AND TSC.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END ) >= #nowTime# AND (CASE WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '2' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) WHEN TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND SUBSTRING(REPETITION, INSTR(REPETITION, '|') + 1, 1) = '1' THEN ADDTIME(DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE), #allDaySTime#) ELSE DATE_SUB(TSC.STARTDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) END ) < DATE_ADD(#nowTime#, INTERVAL #cronMinute# MINUTE)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER SET REMINDERSTATUS = #v_REMINDERSTATUS# WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE SET STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE# WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER( SCHEDULEID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, SCHEDULETYPE, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, TITLE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, REMINDERSTATUS, OFFSETINFO, LANG, OFFSETMIN, PARENTID ) VALUES ( #scheInfo.scheduleId#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, #scheInfo.creatorId#, #scheInfo.creatorName#, #scheInfo.creatorName2#, #scheInfo.scheduleType#, #scheInfo.dateType#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_ENDDATE#, #scheInfo.repetition#, #scheInfo.title#, #v_TENANTID#, #scheInfo.companyid#, #v_REMINDERSTATUS#, #v_OFFSET#, #v_LANG#, #v_OFFSETMIN#, #scheInfo.parentId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPNAME, DESCRIPTION, CREATEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedule_reminder_scheduler where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and ownerid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE ='1' AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND (TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL OR TSC.ISALLREP != 'Y') AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( (SUBSTRING_INDEX(TSRS.REPETITION, '|', 1) = '0' AND DATE_SUB(TSRS.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) < #nowTime#) OR (SUBSTRING_INDEX(TSRS.REPETITION, '|', 1) = '0' AND DATE_SUB(TSRS.ENDDATE, INTERVAL TSCF.REMINDERTIME MINUTE) = #nowTime#) )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET WRITEPERMISSION = #v_WRITEPERMISSION# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: select case when executive > 0 and secreatry > 0 then 'a' when executive > 0 then 'u' when secreatry > 0 then 's' else 'none' end as result from ( select ( select COUNT(*) from tbl_secretary where USERID = #v_USERID# and COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) as executive, ( select COUNT(*) from tbl_secretary where SECRETARYID = #v_USERID# and COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) as secreatry ) counts
SELECT `usage` FROM tbl_executive WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID#
select groupid, groupname, description, createdate from tbl_schedulegather where creatorid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# order by groupname

SELECT COUNT(U.MEMBERID) FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT U.MEMBERID, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, U.MAIL, G.GROUPNAME AS STATUS, '' RESPONSEDATE, U.DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN CONCAT(U.DISPLAYNAME, '(', D.DISPLAYNAME, ')') WHEN '2' THEN CONCAT(U.DISPLAYNAME2, '(', D.DISPLAYNAME2, ')') END INFO FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedulegather where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

delete from tbl_schedulegathermember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
and memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT U.MEMBERID, G.GROUPNAME, G.DESCRIPTION, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, '' as STATUS, DATE_ADD(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL + #v_OFFSETMIN# MINUTE) as RESPONSEDATE, U.MAIL AS MAIL, U.DEPARTMENT FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, IFNULL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedulegather set groupname = #v_GROUPNAME#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION# where groupid = #v_GUID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, MEMBERDEPTID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER SET MEMBERNAME = #v_MEMBERNAME#, MEMBERNAME2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, MEMBERDEPTID = #v_MEMBERDEPTID#, TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2 FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE SECRETARYID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT DEPARTMENTCN AS DEPTID, DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPTNAME, DEPARTMENTNAME2 AS DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_PUBLIC_DEPT WHERE USERCN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, U.DESCRIPTION AS deptName, U.DESCRIPTION2 AS deptName2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE U.CN = #userID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT DEPTID, B.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPTNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_scheduleconfig SET DEFAULTVIEW= #status# WHERE USERID= #userId# AND tenant_id= #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, TAGCOLOR, ISCHECKED, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG WHERE USERID = #userID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG (USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, ISCHECKED, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#userID#, #scheduleType#, #relatedID#, #isChecked#, #tenantID#, #companyID#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ISCHECKED = VALUES(ISCHECKED)

INSERT INTO TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG (USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, TAGCOLOR, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#userId#, #scheduleType#, #relatedId#, #tagColor#, #tenantId#, #companyId#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TAGCOLOR = VALUES(TAGCOLOR)
sqlMap.select: SELECT TAGCOLOR FROM TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG WHERE USERID = #userID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SCHEDULETYPE = #scheduleType# AND RELATEDID = #relatedId#
